subcodes.first_line: The Book which the All-Merciful hath sent down, and it verily testifieth unto that which God hath testified concerning His own Self, that there is none other God but He, the Supreme Protector [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن و انه یشهد بما شهد الله لنفسه انه لا اله الا هو المهیمن
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @suffering and imprisonment, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
